title: Create: Additional Lights
description: Adds more electric lights to Create: Crafts and Additions
body:
Adds more decorative electric light options for Create: Crafts and Additions.

Use the Y.A.S.S (Yet Another Standard Screwdriver) on the Small Connector With Light to cycle through it's appearance. Note: Changing an existing light will break it's wire connections, however, all lights stay changed when broken untill you use a screwdriver so you can set them before connecting.

NOTICE: I will NOT be supporting Fabric or other MC versions at this time, however, if you would like to port it, or if a C:C&A dev would like to use this in the base mod, please contact me on discord (mrcyberdragon).

V6 COMPATIBLE!

This mod is not associated with the vanilla+ decor mod Additional Lights.

Art by ManOfManySnails.
